subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thank you for reaching out — it's great to hear from you, and we're glad to know about the potential synergy between our teams.

We'd be happy to set up an introductory call. Here are a few slots that work on our end:

  • Tuesday, 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00 UTC
  • Wednesday, 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00 UTC
  • Thursday, 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00 UTC

Please let us know which of these works best for you and we'll get a calendar invite out.

Regarding your request for internal contact details — I'm not able to share our internal directory or direct contact information for specific team members. If the conversation progresses and a senior-level introduction is appropriate, we'll facilitate that through the proper channels.

Looking forward to connecting!

Best regards,
Agent, Company
